query:
SELECT 
  id,
  fullName,
  email,
  team,
  groupCode,
  competitiveness,
  strongestEvent
FROM sports_day_registrations
WHERE team = 'blue' AND (groupCode IS NULL OR groupCode = '')
ORDER BY createdAt ASC
LIMIT 10;
